name: Step-1
note: StepFun's debut 100B+-parameter bilingual LLM, publicly launched March 2024; offered via API in 8K/32K/128K/256K context variants (step-1-8k/32k/128k/256k per StepFun's model list docs), since superseded by the Step-3.x series and dropped from current pricing.
verificationNotes: Existence and March 2024 launch confirmed via Wikipedia/AI Wiki/nextomoro descriptions of StepFun's 100B+-parameter Step-1. Confirmed step-1-8k/32k/128k/256k context variants genuinely exist in StepFun's official API model-list docs. No result rows were provided to verify. paramsB/date/openness/license left unchanged as they matched independent descriptions.
